page_title: Neon Genesis Evangelion Screen Saver Vol.2
text:
is a software developed and released by GAINAX.

This is the largest of the Evangelion Screen Saver series Containing 36 different screen savers, 22 wallpapers, 42 icons, 2 games, and desktop themes. 

If you purchased the game during its first release/pressing it came with a limited-run NERV patch. http://web.archive.org/web/20050320054933/http://www.gainax.co.jp/soft/evass2/index-e.html 
 https://ia804606.us.archive.org/26/items/pc_evangelion_screensaver2/cover.jpg
